products.name: ScopeX RoHS Analyzer
products.descriptor: Benchtop XRF analyzer for RoHS/ELV hazardous substance screening

evidence.snippet:
ScopeX RoHS Analyzer
====================
Parent Product
[XRF And XRD Analyzers](/xrf-and-xrd-analyzer/)
The ScopeX RoHS Analyzer is an all-in-one X-ray fluorescence analyzer built for screening and analyzing hazardous elements in compliance with RoHS/ELV regulations.

products.name: ScopeX PG7 Precious Metal Analyzer
products.descriptor: Benchtop XRF precious metal analyzer for jewelry and gold purity inspection

evidence.snippet:
ScopeX PG7 Precious Metal Analyzer for Quality Inspection Agency/Factory
========================================================================
Parent Product

products.name: ToronSpec™ 700D Portable Color Spectrophotometer
products.descriptor: Handheld color spectrophotometer with dual-path optics and four interchangeable apertures

evidence.snippet: The ToronSpec™ 700D Portable Color Spectrophotometer is a professional handheld instrument designed for accurate, consistent, and repeatable color measurement. It delivers high-precision color evaluation across different devices, with excellent inter-instrument agreement and repeatability. This ensures reliable color data for quality control, product inspection, and color communication.
